title: Bonemeal to bones (mod)
description: This mod adds a recipe to make bonemeal back to bones again!
body: This mod adds a recipe to Minecraft for bonemeal to bones how does this work is you place 3 bone meal in the middle of the crafting table like this: ![Bone recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f41e1c03f44bf6e48caf9079b0de3bafe0d30a9d.png) This mod for now is 1.12.2 i will try to put it to 1.16.5 and more, if you find a bug in the mod or a version of the mod doesn't work you can report me it in my discord server, you can find it in the links.
